.exit
(await ethers.provider.getNetwork()).chainId
npx hardhat console --network ganache
.exit
await ethers.provider.getNetwork()
.exit
await contract.getBatchHistory("BATCH001");
const contract = await MedicineTracker.attach("0xE5D2039748a0E771F4072B999505361E1ac47DF2");
const MedicineTracker = await ethers.getContractFactory("MedicineTracker");
await contract.getBatchHistory("BATCH001");
const contract = await MedicineTracker.attach("YOUR_CONTRACT_ADDRESS");
const MedicineTracker = await ethers.getContractFactory("MedicineTracker");
.exit
await contract.scanBatch("FAKE123");
await contract.getBatchHistory("BATCH001");
await contract.scanBatch("BATCH001");
await contract.registerBatch("BATCH001", "Paracetamol");
const contract = await MedicineTracker.attach("0xD104dbB7B9085936e87aaE8D453d506a539B7119");
const MedicineTracker = await ethers.getContractFactory("MedicineTracker");
await contract.getBatchHistory("BATCH001");
await contract.scanBatch("BATCH001");
const contract = await MedicineTracker.attach("0xD104dbB7B9085936e87aaE8D453d506a539B7119");
const MedicineTracker = await ethers.getContractFactory("MedicineTracker");
